description: Letter concerning the dispatch of gold from the congregation in Bilbays, to be delivered in Jerusalem to 'the synagogue of the Yemenite' and to 'the rabbis.' Dated: 22 Sivan 4800 + 174 = 4974 AM = 1 June 1214 CE. The margins and verso are filled with accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals.
description_he: מכתב על משלוח זהב מקהילת בלבייס לירושלים לבית הכנסת 'של התימני' ולרבנים, 1 ביוני 1214.
